reasoning: A 10x spike (over 55 events in a single month) requires an extraordinary volume of 'Strategic Developments' in Belarus, essentially surpassing the entire preceding 12 months' total (which averaged 4.5/month) in just 30 days. Extensive web searches for February and March 2026 reveal no triggering events for such a spike—no mass protests, no surge in arrests, no mobilization for active war involvement, and only isolated instances of drone interceptions (only 3 hostile drones destroyed since the start of 2026) and routine military inspections. Therefore, it is overwhelmingly unlikely that over 55 distinct 'Strategic development' events will be logged by ACLED in the target 30-day window.
